appraisal_events.evidence: Elle avait fait le jeu de grande dame qu’elle désirait, lequel fut universellement admiré et commenté le soir même dans divers salons…
appraisal_events.explanation: The world of salons celebrates his performance as a ‘great lady’, which socially credits his gesture, although the narrator emphasizes that the version circulated distorts reality.

status_effects.explanation: His staging as a ‘great lady’ receives broad worldly approval, reinforcing his local prestige despite the element of artifice.
